bclconvert-yield.description: Total number of bases for this sample as determined by bclconvert demultiplexing (millions)

bclconvert-percent_clusters.description: Percentage of clusters (read pairs) for this sample in this run, as determined by bclconvert demultiplexing

bclconvert-percent_yield.description: Percentage of sequenced bases for this sample in this run
